notes: Confirmed on alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage ('rEvolution - Direct cream color') and int-en products page which lists rEvolution JC shades (e.g., Magenta).

source_catalog.source_title: Official brand site (line page not yet located)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed as a listing in the color range on the official alfaparfmilanopro.com us-en homepage; described in search results as the professional lightening line with multiple powders and Bond System technology. Dedicated line page not fetched.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed in Aveda's official professional hair color brochure (joinaveda.com, 2023/2024): 'full spectrum permanent vegan treatment hair color' with patented technology, 100% grey coverage; salon-exclusive per aveda.com/hair-color.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: 'extra lift & deposit creme color for dark hair', up to 6 levels of lift in 30 minutes; launched 2004 per avedameansbusiness.com history article.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: 'custom-deposit treatment hair color', ammonia-free demi-permanent results, up to 24 washes, blends up to 75% grey; debuted 2018 per avedameansbusiness.com.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure and on aveda.com/vibrant-hair-color: 'semi-permanent treatment hair color', nine shades plus Clear/Charcoal mixers, lasts up to 15 washes, 95% naturally derived.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Confirmed in official joinaveda.com brochure: components are Enlightener powder lightener, Enlightener creme booster, and 3 Enlightener blonde finish protective toners; Enlightener also referenced in stylist formulas on aveda.com/hair-color. Mixed_system because it spans lighteners and toners.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US product page: 'Permanent Crème Color', up to 100% grey coverage, 1:1.5 mix with Majicrème Developer.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US product page: high-lift permanent color, up to 4.5 levels of lift with 40-vol, 1:2 mixing ratio, not designed for white coverage.

source_catalog.source_title: Official brand site (line page not yet located)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified via official US-hosted Majirel color chart PDF and how-to-use PDF on us.lorealprofessionnel.com: 'Cool reflects. Extreme coverage.', 23 shades, 1:1.5 with 20/30-vol Majicrème Developer.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US line page: ammonia-free permanent color with Oil Delivery System (ODS), dedicated iNOA Rich Developers (10/20/30-vol) and post-color shampoo.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US shade-charts page: 'The acidic demi-permanent color to gloss, tone and refresh.'

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US line page: alkaline demi-permanent, no ammonia, up to 70% grey coverage, 40 shades, lifts up to 1.5 levels.

source_catalog.source_title: Official brand site (line page not yet located)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: The official US Dia Color page states Dia Richesse has been 'reimagined' as Dia Color and provides a conversion chart, indicating Dia Richesse is being phased out/replaced in the US.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official US hair-color catalog: multiple Blond Studio SKUs listed including No Bleach Lightening Cream, Platinium Plus paste, 7 Clay Lightener, Multi-Techniques 8 Powder (with and without bonder), and 9 Lightening Powder (with and without bonder).

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified as a real L'Oréal Professionnel direct-dye/temporary color line on the official Dutch site (lorealprofessionnel.nl): 7 shades + Crystal Clear, no oxidant, lasts up to 15 shampoos.

source_catalog.product_line_name: Deepshine Permanent Pure Pigments Conditioning Cream Color
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official ruskprofessional.com pages (/pages/deepshine-permanent and /products/rusk-deepshine-permanent-color): Micro Pure Pigment Technology, 100% gray coverage, 1:1.5 or 1:2 mix with Deepshine developers.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: demi-permanent liquid color, PPD- and ammonia-free, 1:1 mix, up to 20-minute processing.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified via official ruskprofessional.com downloadable-assets page, which hosts 'About Deepshine Xpress Gloss' and 'How to Use Deepshine Xpress Gloss' documents.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: 10-minute permanent cream color with Micro Pigment technology, complete gray coverage, 1:2 with 20-vol developer.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official collection page: intense, vibrant deposit-only colors in 10 shades (incl. Icy White toner), intermixable; positioned as semi-permanent direct color.

source_catalog.source_title: Official brand site (line page not yet located)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: The official Deepshine Direct collection page links to a 'deepshine lighteners' collection on ruskprofessional.com, confirming a lightener offering exists; the dedicated collection page itself was not fetched, so shade/SKU detail is unverified.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official moroccanoilprofessionals.com haircolor collection and moroccanoil.com/pages/permanent-color: ProArginine + ArganID system.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official moroccanoil.com demi-permanent page and in the official Color Manual PDF on moroccanoilprofessionals.com: includes Color Calypso Demi-Permanent Gloss (liquid, used with Gloss Activator) and Color Calypso Demi-Permanent Cream Color.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official product page and moroccanoil.com/pages/color-infusion: 7 gel-based pure pigments used to intensify, neutralize, or pastelize Color Rhapsody / Color Calypso formulas; can also be mixed with Oxidative Cream Developer for a direct color boost.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official moroccanoil.com page and the official Color Manual PDF: Blonde Voyage Powder Lightener (up to 9 levels), Clay Lightener, and Cream Lightener, all with BondCare + ArganID system; all three also listed on the moroccanoilprofessionals.com haircolor collection.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official moroccanoil.com collection page: 6 shades (Cocoa, Bordeaux, Copper, Platinum, Rose Gold, Coral) in 6.7 oz and travel sizes.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official site: 25+ vivid direct-dye shades (incl. 5 UV-reactive neons, Clear, Dopamine black), no developer needed, 35-minute room-temperature processing, ammonia/PPD/MEA/paraben-free, vegan.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official site: 56 acidic, zero-lift demi-permanent liquid gloss toner shades with vegan bonder; 1:1 with dedicated Gloss Toner Developer, 3-10 minute processing (30-35 min for grey blending).

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official site: alkaline, progressive demi-permanent cream toners with bonder; mixed 1:2 to 1:3 with 5-volume Deluxe Cream Developer, 5-20 minute processing; core shades Cool Blonde, Silver, Violet (per CosmoProf listing).

source_catalog.product_line_name: Powder Lightener & Cream Lightener (with Bonding Complex)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official blonding page: Powder Lightener (9+ levels of lift; Polycare Split + Arginine bonding complex, Ormagel seaweed) and the newer Cream Lightener (9+ levels, gentler, with jojoba and aloe vera), both used with Deluxe Cream Developers.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on the official Epilogue site (dangerjonescreativeepilogue.com): brand's first permanent line, launched March 2026; 84 intermixable shades incl. high lifts and boosters, 100% grey coverage, PPD- and resorcinol-free, vegan bonding complex, 1:1 with Deluxe Cream Developer (5-40 vol), 35-45 min processing.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official mydentitycolor.com page: permanent crèmes with Miru-Style X-HP heat protection and VibraRiche technology; 1:1 with 10-40V developer, 30-40 minute processing.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: demi-permanent crèmes mixed 1:2 with dedicated 6V Demi-Permanent Developer, 5-25 minute processing.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: 7 fast-processing demi-permanent toner shades (Titanium, Sand Storm, Pearl, Misty Mauve, Golden Sand, Eclipse, Blush).

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: 15-shade liquid demi-permanent range plus Clear; deposit-only, ammonia- and alcohol-free, 1:1 with 6V developer, 15-minute processing, lasts up to 25 shampoos.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official direct-dyes page: 9+ Super Power shades listed (Violet Sorcery, Titanium Shield, Sheer Power, Purple Raven, Pink Possession, Phoenix Fire, Ocean Reign, Night Warrior, Magenta Magic); no developer required, ~20-minute processing per retailer detail.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official education page: original Vibrant/Pastel direct dye range, no developer required, 20-minute processing, pre-lightening with Big9 recommended.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: creme lightener lifting up to 9 levels in a single application without heat; 1:1.5 mix for global application, on-scalp up to 20 volume.

source_catalog.coverage_summary: Line existence, positioning, and partial technical claims as captured in Stage 1 notes.
notes: Verified on official page: dust-free violet powder lightener, lifts up to 8 levels, 1:1 to 1:3 mixing with #mydentity developer.
